properties.name: security.jwt.private-key-path
properties.description: Path to the RSA private key PEM file used for JWT signing.

properties.name: security.jwt.public-key-path
properties.description: Path to the RSA public key PEM file used for JWT verification.

properties.name: security.jwt.expiration-minutes
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in minutes.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: Default sender address for outgoing application emails.

properties.name: app.mail.admin-to
properties.description: Recipient address for admin notification emails.

properties.name: app.security.rate-limit.auth-requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum number of authentication requests allowed per minute per IP.
